title: Native queue inline-drain probe
scope: Add explicit inline drain mode for the Gate545 native raw FITS completion queue.
Keep thread drain as the queue opt-in default.
Record drain mode and inline/thread wait counters in resident artifacts and resident light pipeline profiles.
Run real 200-light inline-vs-thread probe and keep the faster safer path as default.

commands.inline_real_run: GLASS_RESIDENT_NATIVE_QUEUE_READ=1 GLASS_RESIDENT_NATIVE_QUEUE_DRAIN_MODE=inline glass run --plan C:/glass_runs/phase2_s2_gate540_plan_spec_cache/runs_20260623_140314/processing_plan.json --out C:/glass_runs/phase2_s2_gate546_inline_queue_drain/runs_20260623_160000/native_queue_inline_release --backend cuda --memory-mode resident --until-stage integration --local-normalization off --integration-rejection winsorized_sigma --integration-weighting none --flat-floor 0.05 --resident-registration similarity_cuda_triangle --resident-star-threshold 350 --resident-star-max-candidates 48 --resident-star-tolerance-px 3 --resident-ncc-sample-stride 4 --resident-warp-interpolation lanczos3 --reference-frame-id LIGHT_H_0136 --resident-output-maps audit --resident-master-cache-dir C:/glass_runs/phase2_s2_gate518_dq_stats_reuse/runs_20260623_094619/resident_master_cache
commands.thread_real_run: GLASS_RESIDENT_NATIVE_QUEUE_READ=1 glass run --plan C:/glass_runs/phase2_s2_gate540_plan_spec_cache/runs_20260623_140314/processing_plan.json --out C:/glass_runs/phase2_s2_gate546_inline_queue_drain/runs_20260623_160000/native_queue_thread_release --backend cuda --memory-mode resident --until-stage integration --local-normalization off --integration-rejection winsorized_sigma --integration-weighting none --flat-floor 0.05 --resident-registration similarity_cuda_triangle --resident-star-threshold 350 --resident-star-max-candidates 48 --resident-star-tolerance-px 3 --resident-ncc-sample-stride 4 --resident-warp-interpolation lanczos3 --reference-frame-id LIGHT_H_0136 --resident-output-maps audit --resident-master-cache-dir C:/glass_runs/phase2_s2_gate518_dq_stats_reuse/runs_20260623_094619/resident_master_cache

device.name: NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Workstation Edition

decision.reason: Inline drain is bitwise-correct but slower than thread drain in the same 200-light session.

known_limitations: Inline drain is an explicit experiment and not a promoted optimization.
The thread-drain queue path remains opt-in; default GLASS still uses guarded native_u16 raw reads without queue unless GLASS_RESIDENT_NATIVE_QUEUE_READ=1.
Python completion materialization remains the bottleneck class to remove in a future native read-to-calibration coordinator.
next_gate: Prototype a native read-to-calibration wave coordinator that avoids Python completion materialization instead of moving it between Python threads.

clean_room.notes: This gate uses GLASS code, user image data, GLASS timing artifacts, and user-generated reference metrics only. It does not inspect external implementation source or alter input data.
